name: Personal Memory
description: Remember, search, show, and forget durable personal information about the user.

toolDeclarations.name: remember_user_fact
toolDeclarations.description: Save a learning, user choice, preference, behavior, command discovery, fact, or procedure to durable memory. Call this automatically and proactively whenever you learn something new (e.g. a command that solved a problem, user's behavioral choice, or mistake to avoid) or when the user explicitly states something to remember.

kind.description: Memory category. Use 'learning' for lessons/mistakes avoided, 'discovery' for command combinations/solutions, 'behavior' or 'preference' for user habits, choices, and profile/fact for user details.

key.description: Stable short key for the memory, such as user:self, favorite:song, contact:john, command:git, or trick:port.

value.description: The fact, discovery, behavior description, or error-fix to remember.

toolDeclarations.name: show_user_memory
toolDeclarations.description: Show remembered personal information. Use when the user asks what you remember, asks about known preferences, contacts, music, schedule, or profile.

toolDeclarations.name: forget_user_memory
toolDeclarations.description: Delete personal memory matching a query. Use when the user asks you to forget, remove, clear, or delete something you remember.

query.description: Text to match in memory key or value.
